items.title: Official: Light to moderate Rain is very likely to occur at isolated places over Beed, Dharashiv, Hingoli, Jalna, Latur, Mumbai, Mumbai Suburban, Nanded, Nashik, Palghar, Parbhani, Pune, Raigad, Ratnagiri, Satara, Thane in next 3 hours.
